mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (competition_id, student_id, team_id, status, remark) VALUES (#{competitionId}, #{studentId}, #{teamId}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, c.title as competition_title, u.real_name as student_name, u.student_id as student_id_str, t.name as team_name, c.fee, a.id as award_id, a.award_level, a.award_name, a.score as award_score, a.ranking, a.award_time FROM registration r LEFT JOIN competition c ON r.competition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN team t ON r.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN award a ON r.id = a.registration_id WHERE r.id = #{id}
